indications.text:
MINOCIN® Intravenous is indicated in the treatment of the following infections due to
susceptible isolates of the designated bacteria:
Rocky Mountain spotted fever, typhus fever and the typhus group, Q fever, rickettsialpox
and tick fevers caused by rickettsiae.
